debug_info.goal:
case pos
Ω : Type
inst✝¹ : MeasureSpace Ω
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure volume
A B : Set Ω
hB : volume B ≠ 0
h : volume A = 0
⊢ condProb Ω inst✝¹ A B = volume A * condProb Ω inst✝¹ B A / volume B

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
-- Case 1: ℙ A = 0
    have h₁ : ℙ(B|A) = 0 := by
      have h₂ : ℙ(B|A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A := rfl
      rw [h₂]
      have h₃ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = 0 := by
        have h₄ : ℙ (B ∩ A) ≤ ℙ A := by
          apply measure_mono
          <;> simp [Set.inter_comm]
          <;> aesop
        have h₅ : ℙ A = 0 := h
        have h₆ : ℙ (B ∩ A) ≤ 0 := by
          calc
            ℙ (B ∩ A) ≤ ℙ A := h₄
            _ = 0 := h₅
        have h₇ : ℙ (B ∩ A) ≥ 0 := by
          apply zero_le
        have h₈ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = 0 := by
          linarith
        exact h₈
      rw [h₃]
      simp [h]
      <;> aesop
    
    have h₂ : ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B = 0 := by
      rw [h₁]
      have h₃ : ℙ A = 0 := h
      rw [h₃]
      simp [hB]
      <;> aesop
    
    have h₃ : ℙ(A|B) = 0 := by
      have h₄ : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
      rw [h₄]
      have h₅ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
        have h₆ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := by
          apply measure_mono
          <;> simp [Set.inter_comm]
          <;> aesop
        have h₇ : ℙ A = 0 := h
        have h₈ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ 0 := by
          calc
            ℙ (A ∩ B) ≤ ℙ A := h₆
            _ = 0 := h₇
        have h₉ : ℙ (A ∩ B) ≥ 0 := by
          apply zero_le
        have h₁₀ : ℙ (A ∩ B) = 0 := by
          linarith
        exact h₁₀
      rw [h₅]
      simp [hB]
      <;> aesop
    
    have h₄ : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B := by
      rw [h₃, h₂]
      <;> aesop
    
    exact h₄
  · -- Case 2: ℙ A ≠ 0
    have h₁ : ℙ(B|A) = ℙ(A|B) * ℙ B / ℙ A := by
      have h₂ : ℙ(B|A) = ℙ (B ∩ A) / ℙ A := rfl
      have h₃ : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
      rw [h₂, h₃]
      have h₄ : ℙ (B ∩ A) = ℙ (A ∩ B) := by
        rw [Set.inter_comm]
      rw [h₄]
      <;> field_simp [h, hB]
      <;> ring
      <;> simp_all [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero]
      <;> aesop
    
    have h₂ : ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B = ℙ(A|B) := by
      rw [h₁]
      have h₃ : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ (A ∩ B) / ℙ B := rfl
      rw [h₃]
      have h₄ : ℙ A ≠ 0 := h
      have h₅ : ℙ B ≠ 0 := hB
      field_simp [h₄, h₅]
      <;> ring
      <;> simp_all [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero]
      <;> aesop
    
    have h₃ : ℙ(A|B) = ℙ A * ℙ(B|A) / ℙ B := by
      rw [h₂]
      <;> aesop
    
    exact h₃
